name: Particle Intro Animation
description: Particle-based intro animation with aurora background, floating particles with connections, and title text appearing through particles.

aurora-background.code: function AuroraBackground(props) { var w = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.width : 1920; var h = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.height : 1080; var frame = props.frame || 0; var fps = props.fps || 30; var t = frame / fps; var colors = props.colors || ['#667eea', '#764ba2', '#f093fb', '#4facfe']; var speed = props.speed || 0.8; var blur = props.blur || 40; var opacity = props.opacity || 0.6; var blobs = []; for (var i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) { var phase = i * Math.PI * 2 / colors.length; var x = 50 + Math.sin(t * speed * 0.5 + phase) * 30; var y = 30 + Math.cos(t * speed * 0.3 + phase * 1.5) * 25; var scale = 1 + Math.sin(t * speed * 0.2 + i) * 0.3; blobs.push(React.createElement('div', { key: i, style: { position: 'absolute', left: x + '%', top: y + '%', width: (300 * scale) + 'px', height: (200 * scale) + 'px', borderRadius: '50%', background: colors[i], filter: 'blur(' + blur + 'px)', opacity: opacity, transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)', transition: 'none' } })); } return React.createElement('div', { style: { position: 'relative', width: '100%', height: '100%', overflow: 'hidden', background: '#0a0a1f' } }, blobs); }

particle-system.code: function ParticleSystem(props) { var count = props.count || 60; var w = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.width : (props.width || 1920); var h = props.layerSize ? props.layerSize.height : (props.height || 1080); var frame = props.frame || 0; var fps = props.fps || 30; var t = frame / fps; var seed = props.seed || 0; var dir = props.direction || 'radial'; var wrap = props.wrap || false; var fadeOut = props.fadeOut !== undefined ? props.fadeOut : false; var fadeIn = props.fadeIn !== undefined ? props.fadeIn : false; var lifetime = props.lifetime || 999; var sizeRange = Array.isArray(props.size) ? props.size : [props.size || 4, props.size || 4]; var speedRange = Array.isArray(props.speed) ? props.speed : [props.speed || 1, props.speed || 1]; var opacityRange = Array.isArray(props.opacity) ? props.opacity : [props.opacity || 1, props.opacity || 1]; var color = props.color || '#ffffff'; var pType = props.type || 'circle'; function rng(i) { var x = Math.sin(i * 9301 + seed * 49297 + 233280) * 0.5 + 0.5; return x - Math.floor(x); } var els = []; for (var i = 0; i < count; i++) { var r1 = rng(i * 7 + 1); var r2 = rng(i * 13 + 2); var r3 = rng(i * 19 + 3); var r4 = rng(i * 31 + 4); var r5 = rng(i * 43 + 5); var sz = sizeRange[0] + r1 * (sizeRange[1] - sizeRange[0]); var spd = speedRange[0] + r2 * (speedRange[1] - speedRange[0]); var op = opacityRange[0] + r3 * (opacityRange[1] - opacityRange[0]); var x, y; if (dir === 'radial') { var angle = r4 * Math.PI * 2; var dist = t * spd * 60; x = w / 2 + Math.cos(angle) * dist; y = h / 2 + Math.sin(angle) * dist; } else if (dir === 'down') { x = r4 * w; y = ((r5 * h + t * spd * 60) % (h + 20)) - 10; if (!wrap && y < 0) continue; } else { x = r4 * w + Math.sin(t * spd + i) * 30; y = r5 * h + Math.cos(t * spd + i * 0.7) * 30; } if (wrap) { x = ((x % w) + w) % w; y = ((y % h) + h) % h; } var age = frame; if (fadeOut && age > lifetime * 0.5) op *= Math.max(0, 1 - (age - lifetime * 0.5) / (lifetime * 0.5)); if (fadeIn && age < 30) op *= age / 30; if (op <= 0) continue; var c = Array.isArray(color) ? color[i % color.length] : color; if (pType === 'star') { var pts = ''; for (var j = 0; j < 10; j++) { var a = j * Math.PI / 5 - Math.PI / 2; var rad = j % 2 === 0 ? sz : sz * 0.4; pts += (x + Math.cos(a) * rad) + ',' + (y + Math.sin(a) * rad) + ' '; } els.push(React.createElement('polygon', { key: i, points: pts.trim(), fill: c, opacity: op })); } else if (pType === 'square') { els.push(React.createElement('rect', { key: i, x: x - sz/2, y: y - sz/2, width: sz, height: sz, fill: c, opacity: op })); } else { els.push(React.createElement('circle', { key: i, cx: x, cy: y, r: sz, fill: c, opacity: op })); } } if (props.connections) { var maxDist = props.connectionDistance || 120; var connColor = props.connectionColor || color; var connOp = props.connectionOpacity || 0.3; for (var a = 0; a < Math.min(count, 40); a++) { var r4a = rng(a * 31 + 4); var r5a = rng(a * 43 + 5); var spda = speedRange[0] + rng(a * 13 + 2) * (speedRange[1] - speedRange[0]); var xa = r4a * w + Math.sin(t * spda + a) * 30; var ya = r5a * h + Math.cos(t * spda + a * 0.7) * 30; for (var b = a + 1; b < Math.min(count, 40); b++) { var r4b = rng(b * 31 + 4); var r5b = rng(b * 43 + 5); var spdb = speedRange[0] + rng(b * 13 + 2) * (speedRange[1] - speedRange[0]); var xb = r4b * w + Math.sin(t * spdb + b) * 30; var yb = r5b * h + Math.cos(t * spdb + b * 0.7) * 30; var dx = xa - xb; var dy = ya - yb; var d = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy); if (d < maxDist) { els.push(React.createElement('line', { key: 'c' + a + '-' + b, x1: xa, y1: ya, x2: xb, y2: yb, stroke: typeof connColor === 'string' ? connColor : '#fff', strokeWidth: props.connectionWidth || 1, opacity: connOp * (1 - d / maxDist) })); } } } } return React.createElement('svg', { width: w, height: h, style: { position: 'absolute', top: 0, left: 0 } }, els); }
particle-system.description: Versatile particle system with configurable direction, shape, and physics
